anchor_fixtures._provenance_note: Path bollard 1 extracted from landscape architect Rev-A garden lighting layout dated 2026-05-26; 1000mm tall stainless cylindrical bollard, IP65 SELV LED luminaire, 12V SELV feed.
Path bollard 2 extracted from landscape architect Rev-A garden lighting layout dated 2026-05-26; 4m east of bollard 1 along the main east-west path; same SELV 12V feed.
Path bollard 3 extracted from landscape architect Rev-A garden lighting layout dated 2026-05-26; 4m east of bollard 2 along the main east-west path; same SELV 12V feed.
Bollard 4 added by lighting engineer at first review (north terrace edge) to balance the photometric pattern; not on architect Rev-A; engineer-manual-entry tier honest-disclosed for INV-09.
Bollard 5 added by lighting engineer at first review (north terrace edge) symmetric to bollard 4; engineer-manual-entry tier honest-disclosed for INV-09.

Bollard 6 inferred at the east feature-tree position based on landscape typology (illuminated feature tree); position assumed at the tree centroid from arboricultural survey; weakest provenance tier — engineer-of-record to verify final position.

zones._clause_citation: BS 7671:2018 §715 + BS EN 61558-2-6 (no §715 sub-clauses in verified file)
zones._derivation_note: ELV barrier zone for bollard 1: 500mm radius separation buffer per spec §5.4 ELV barrier-zone convention; 12-sided regular polygon approximation per spec §5.7. Inside the buffer ELV (12 V SELV) and LV (230 V) cables must be separated by ≥100mm OR by a physical barrier. The buffer is height-limited to 1500mm because bollard height is 1000mm and the cable-rise zone tops out at the bollard head.

zones._clause_citation: BS 7671:2018 §715 + BS EN 61558-2-6 (no §715 sub-clauses in verified file)
zones._derivation_note: ELV barrier zone for bollard 2: 500mm radius separation buffer; 12-sided polygon approximation. Bollard 2 at (7000,3000) — 4000mm clear of bollard 1; no overlap (sum of radii = 1000mm < 4000mm separation).

zones._clause_citation: BS 7671:2018 §715 + BS EN 61558-2-6 (no §715 sub-clauses in verified file)
zones._derivation_note: ELV barrier zone for bollard 3: 500mm radius separation buffer; 12-sided polygon. Bollard 3 at (11000,3000) — 4000mm clear of bollard 2; no overlap.

zones._clause_citation: BS 7671:2018 §715 + BS EN 61558-2-6 (no §715 sub-clauses in verified file)
zones._derivation_note: ELV barrier zone for bollard 4: 500mm radius separation buffer; 12-sided polygon. North terrace edge position; provenance is engineer_manual_entry (not architectural drawing) — surfaced in INV-09 and contributes to D-1 / D-5 reviewer judgment.

zones._clause_citation: BS 7671:2018 §715 + BS EN 61558-2-6 (no §715 sub-clauses in verified file)
zones._derivation_note: ELV barrier zone for bollard 5: 500mm radius separation buffer; 12-sided polygon. Symmetric mirror of bollard 4 across x=7500; same engineer_manual_entry provenance tier.

zones._clause_citation: BS 7671:2018 §715 + BS EN 61558-2-6 (no §715 sub-clauses in verified file)
zones._derivation_note: ELV barrier zone for bollard 6: 500mm radius separation buffer; 12-sided polygon. East feature-tree position; provenance is inferred_from_room_type — weakest tier — engineer-of-record to verify final position. Surfaced in INV-09 and primary trigger for D-1 reviewer flag (suppressed in this example because D-5 already covers the missing ambient temperature).

electrical_constraints._clause_citation: BS 7671:2018 §715 + BS EN 61558-2-6 (no §715 sub-clauses in verified file)
electrical_constraints._derivation_note: ELV separation requirement per §715 + BS EN 61558-2-6: 12 V SELV bollard circuits must be separated from any 230 V LV cabling by ≥100 mm OR by an insulated barrier OR by routing in a separate conduit. The safety isolating transformer must be short-circuit protected per BS EN 61558-2-6 §17 (transformer-secondary side fault tolerance). Cable labelling required on every ELV circuit so future maintainers do not confuse 12 V with 230 V. All conditions enforced room-wide; no §715 sub-clauses exist in the verified file so honest disclosure stamped in _elv_general_citation.
electrical_constraints._elv_general_citation: BS 7671:2018 §715 + BS EN 61558-2-6 (no §715 sub-clauses in verified file)

non_compliance_flags.message: 230V LV socket_violation_1 placed at (3200, 3000, 800) sits INSIDE the elv_barrier_zone of elv_bollard_1 (500mm radius around bollard at (3000, 3000); z=800 within height range 0-1500). socket_230v at 230V is in zone.prohibited_fixture_types per BS 7671:2018 §715 (ELV/LV separation barrier) — max_voltage_v in this zone is 12V SELV. Remediation: relocate the LV socket OUTSIDE the 500mm barrier radius around every elv_bollard AND ensure ≥100mm cable separation between ELV and LV cabling per §715 + BS EN 61558-2-6.

assumptions: Cascade source: standalone C.1 example uk-external-landscape-elv-lighting. Synthetic upstream small-power intent ADDS a violating 230V LV socket at (3200, 3000, 800) INSIDE the elv_barrier_zone of elv_bollard_1.
Violation: socket_230v (230V LV) inside ELV barrier zone (max_voltage_v=12 SELV) — voltage_above_max sub-rule fires per §715.
INV-07 still PASSes: elv_separation constraint IS present in the IR (the constraint is still derived correctly).
External installation; ambient_temperature_c NOT supplied → D-5 reviewer flag carries forward.
elv_bollard_6 sourced via inferred_from_room_type → D-1 (informational) carries forward.
_engineering_judgments: REVIEWER D-5: external installation (room.is_external=true) without ambient_temperature_c supplied. Default 30°C cable de-rating per BS 7671:2018 Appendix 4 Table 4B1 assumed; engineer-of-record to verify against installation-site temperature data before sign-off.

REVIEWER D-1 (informational, not blocking): elv_bollard_6 sourced via inferred_from_room_type (weakest provenance tier per INV-09). Engineer-of-record to verify final feature-tree centroid position before installation. D-5 is the primary reviewer flag for this example; D-1 noted here for transparency.

invariants.evidence: 6 anchors (elv_bollard_1..6) produce 6 zones[] (one elv_barrier_zone each). Pairwise centre-to-centre distances 4000mm (1↔2, 2↔3) and >5000mm (4↔5, others) — all exceed sum-of-radii (1000mm) → no overlaps; overlapping_with_zone_ids empty on every zone. No silent merges.

existing_fixtures_audit[] has 7 entries: 6 compliant elv_luminaires + 1 violation (lv_socket_violation_1). non_compliance_flags[] has 1 entry citing lv_socket_violation_1 with severity=critical, clause=BS 7671:2018 §715. One-to-one correspondence: 1 violation entry ↔ 1 non_compliance_flag entry. PASS (catalogue integrity holds; cascade compliant=false is the core failure signal).
No medical_envelope_group_2 zone present in IR. §710 + BS EN 61557-8 medical IT system requirement N/A; INV-03 vacuously passes per spec §7.2.
room_type=external_landscape, not bathroom/shower_room/sauna. §701.411.3.3 + §703.411.3.3 RCD blanket N/A — INV-04 vacuously passes per spec §7.2.
Not a swimming_pool_hall. §702.415.1 pool main equipotential bonding N/A — INV-05 vacuously passes.
No bath_basin (no bath_tray fixture_type). §701.512.2 whirlpool pump IPx5 constraint N/A — INV-06 vacuously passes.

6 elv_lighting_circuit_anchors in anchor_fixtures (elv_bollard_1 through elv_bollard_6); 6 elv_barrier_zones derived; elv_separation constraint PRESENT in electrical_constraints[]. INV-07 verifies the constraint IS present in the IR — and it IS — so INV-07 PASSes. The §715 zone-table fixture-audit (sub-rule (a)/(d)) is where the lv_socket_violation_1 issue is caught, NOT at the constraint-derivation level.

7 existing fixtures audited against §715 derived elv_barrier_zones. 6 compliant elv_luminaires (each sits ON the bollard centroid; SELV 12V; permitted in own barrier zone). FAILURE: lv_socket_violation_1 at (3200, 3000, 800) — position INSIDE the 500mm barrier radius of elv_bollard_1 (distance to bollard centroid (3000,3000) = 200mm < 500mm radius) AND z=800 INSIDE barrier height range 0-1500mm. Sub-rule (d) voltage_above_max FIRES: 230V > zone.max_voltage_v 12V SELV per §715. (a) type_prohibited would also fire (socket_230v in barrier zone's prohibited_fixture_types). violation_sub_rule recorded as voltage_above_max (the primary fail per §715 ELV/LV separation rationale — the barrier zone EXISTS to enforce voltage separation). violation_clause: BS 7671:2018 §715. severity: critical. 1 violation; INV-08 FAILS.

Mixed provenance: bollards 1/2/3 use architectural_drawing_extraction (strongest); 4/5 use engineer_manual_entry; 6 uses inferred_from_room_type (weakest). All 6 _provenance_note strings ≥40 chars (lengths range 156-189). Provenance disclosure complete; mixed-tier honestly surfaced via D-1 informational flag in _engineering_judgments[].

compliant=false because violation_count_critical=1 > 0. Self-consistency check: compliant ⟺ (violation_count_critical==0 ∧ violation_count_high==0 ∧ non_compliance_flags==[]). The compliant=false verdict correctly reflects the 1 critical violation + 1 non_compliance_flag. The cascade hand-off correctly propagates: downstream small-power INV-12 will FAIL HIGH on consumption.

rationale.chat_summary: FAIL HIGH cascade — violating 230V LV socket placed INSIDE the elv_barrier_zone of elv_bollard_1 at (3200, 3000, 800). socket_230v at 230V violates the zone max_voltage_v=12 SELV per BS 7671:2018 §715. INV-07 still PASSes (constraint IS present); INV-08 + INV-10 FAIL. compliant=false; 1 critical non_compliance_flag. D-5 + D-1 reviewer judgments carry forward.

sections.title: Cascade context — FAIL HIGH
sections.summary: Failure-mode cascade — the synthetic upstream small-power intent ADDS a violating 230V LV socket at (3200, 3000, 800) inside the 500mm-radius elv_barrier_zone of elv_bollard_1 (centroid 3000, 3000; barrier height 0-1500mm). The 6 compliant ELV luminaires + the elv_separation constraint are unchanged from the C.1 source. This is the central failure-mode demonstration for §715 ELV/LV separation enforcement at the cascade-consumer boundary.

sections.title: Standards applied
sections.summary: BS 7671:2018+A2:2022 §715 governs ELV (SELV) lighting installations. §715 + BS EN 61558-2-6 mandate (1) SELV isolating transformer with short-circuit protection on the primary side; (2) ≥100mm physical separation OR a physical barrier between ELV and LV cabling; (3) labelling at every isolating transformer (HSE convention). The elv_barrier_zone enforces (2): zone.max_voltage_v=12 prohibits LV cabling/fixtures inside the buffer radius. The barrier zone IS the §715 separation rule encoded geometrically.

sections.title: INV-07 PASS — constraint IS present
sections.summary: INV-07 verifies the elv_separation constraint is present in electrical_constraints[] when ELV anchors exist. The constraint IS present (carried forward from C.1 source) — the §715 + BS EN 61558-2-6 separation rule is correctly derived. INV-07 PASSes. The violation is at the FIXTURE-AUDIT layer (INV-08 sub-rule), not at the constraint-derivation layer.

sections.title: INV-08 sub-rule walk-through (the FAILURE)
sections.summary: Sub-rule (d) voltage_above_max FIRES on lv_socket_violation_1: 230V > zone.max_voltage_v=12V SELV per §715. The position (3200, 3000, 800) sits inside the 500mm barrier radius of elv_bollard_1 (Euclidean distance to bollard centroid (3000, 3000) = 200mm) AND inside the barrier vertical envelope (z=800 < 1500). Sub-rule (a) type_prohibited would also fire (socket_230v in barrier zone's prohibited_fixture_types) — the audit records voltage_above_max as the primary sub-rule because §715 is fundamentally a VOLTAGE separation rule. violation_clause: BS 7671:2018 §715. severity: critical.

sections.title: Consumer-side hand-off — small-power INV-12 FAIL HIGH
sections.summary: When small-power v1.2 consumes this special-locations intent, INV-12 sub-check 1 (zone exclusion) FIRES on lv_socket_violation_1: the consumed LV socket position is inside an ELV barrier zone. small-power INV-12 FAILS HIGH, propagating a non_compliance_flag with severity=critical, clause=BS 7671:2018 §715, and _cascaded_from: special-locations preserved. small-power's output IR's compliant flag flips to false; its calculation_summary.violation_count_critical bumps to 1.

sections.title: Remediation
sections.summary: Per non_compliance_flags[0].message: relocate the LV socket OUTSIDE the 500mm barrier radius around EVERY elv_bollard (6 barriers total in this installation) AND ensure ≥100mm cable separation between ELV and LV cabling per §715 + BS EN 61558-2-6. Typical landscape practice: route LV cabling along a separate trench/duct or via a fixed barrier (concrete edging) from the ELV bollard circuit.

sections.title: D-5 + D-1 reviewer judgments — carried forward
sections.summary: D-5: external installation without ambient_temperature_c → default 30°C de-rating per BS 7671:2018 Appendix 4 Table 4B1 assumed; engineer-of-record to verify. D-1 (informational): elv_bollard_6 sourced via inferred_from_room_type (weakest provenance tier). Both flags carry forward from C.1 source — they do NOT change the compliant=false verdict (which is driven by the §715 ELV/LV separation critical violation, not the reviewer judgments).

sections.title: Honest disclosures
sections.summary: Synthetic upstream small-power intent. The FAIL HIGH outcome is the CENTRAL ENGINEERING VALUE — the cascade chain catches the §715 voltage-separation violation at the special-locations layer with proper _cascaded_from provenance. INV-07 PASS while INV-08 FAIL is the design-intended behaviour: constraint-derivation and fixture-audit are decoupled invariants per spec §7.2.
